items.claim: Conor McGregor is incapable of defeating Islam Makhachev.
Max Holloway is a superior boxer to Conor McGregor.
items.quote: Max is such a great boxer.

items.claim: Conor McGregor out-wrestled and dominated Max Holloway on the ground in their first fight.
items.quote: Conor goes out there and out-wrestles a very young Max Holloway. First round is on the feet, Conor wins it, but second and third rounds, Conor decides to wrestle Max and he's dominant on the ground with Max Holloway.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has a steel rod in his leg.
items.quote: I know he's he's got a literal steel rod in his ankle or in his leg.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will be competitive with Max Holloway on the feet.
items.quote: I oddly I I think Conor's going to be quite competitive on the feet.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has been inactive for five years.
Conor McGregor likely improved his wrestling in preparation for a fight against Michael Chandler.
items.quote: Conor had to have worked on his wrestling for the Chandler fight.
